phase_0_inventory.note: 15 candidate sources identified (3 Tier 1 bulk + 7 Tier 3 PDFs + 5 Tier 4 live pages). Full inventory at src/data/councils/pdfs/council-pdfs/kent/inventory.json. Key finding: kent.gov.uk + democracy.kent.gov.uk both return HTTP 403 on direct fetch (Cloudflare-style bot block). Phase 1 routed entirely through Internet Archive Wayback.

phase_1_archive.note: 5 of 7 Tier 3 PDFs archived via Wayback (2 pre-existing snapshots + 3 SavePageNow triggers). The 2 blocked PDFs (Budget Book 2025-26 + Councillors Allowances 2024-25, both on www.kent.gov.uk) return HTTP 520 from IA — Cloudflare refuses IA crawler. Affected fields stripped rather than fabricated.

phase_1b_visual_evidence.note: 7 page-image PNGs generated at 150 DPI from the Feb 2025 Draft Revenue Budget MTFP. Each field_sources[k].page_image_url points at /archive/kent/images/<field>-p<page>.png for inline popover rendering.

phase_2_extract.note: Values extracted via pdftotext -layout. Verbatim excerpts folded into each field_sources[k].excerpt.

phase_3_strip.note: Stripped arrays: performance_kpis, service_spending, top_suppliers, salary_bands, grant_payments, waste_destinations, councillor_allowances_detail, council_tax_shares, service_outcomes. Stripped scalars: chief_executive_salary, staff_fte, total_allowances_cost. Cabinet reduced to Leader-only. Full reasons in docs/KENT-AUDIT.md §4.

phase_4_populate.note: 13 field_sources entries populated with NORTH-STAR §4 full schema (url+#page, title, accessed, data_year, tier, extraction_method, sha256_at_access/archive_exempt, page, excerpt, page_image_url). Fixed: revenue_budget 2274m→1530.9m, council_tax_requirement 994287655→994287650, reserves 85m→43m, population 1589100→1639029.

phase_5_verify.note: Passes audit-north-star 0/5 gaps. Full validator suite: 0 errors, 0 regressions (intentional strips registered in completeness.mjs INTENTIONAL_REMOVALS). Kent added to STRICT_COUNCILS in tier-classification.mjs.

phase_5b_ux_audit.note: ux-audit.mjs: 0 unwrapped numeric values, 0 derived/comparator values. Live Kent page renders 59 SourceAnnotation-wrapped values. Automated audit report at scripts/validate/reports/ux-audit-kent.json.

phase_6_document.note: src/data/councils/docs/KENT-AUDIT.md (full Datasheet for Datasets per Gebru 2021) + src/data/councils/manifests/kent.json (reproducibility manifest).

phase_7_ship.note: To be marked true on merge of rollout/kent on both repos.

known_constraints.bot_blocking: All kent.gov.uk and democracy.kent.gov.uk URLs return HTTP 403 on direct fetch AND Internet Archive SavePageNow returns 520 on www.kent.gov.uk PDFs. Affected: Budget Book 2025-26 (service_spending stripped), Councillors Allowances 2024-25 (councillor_allowances_detail + total_allowances_cost stripped), news.kent.gov.uk cabinet reshuffle articles (cabinet reduced to Leader-only).
known_constraints.ce_salary_not_sourceable: Kent publishes grade ranges (Pay Policy) and part-year historic (SoA Note 33) but not a named-officer headline figure for a full year. Field stripped rather than derived.
